prediction.reasoning: For a 1-day prediction of PG (Procter & Gamble), I used a conservative approach given the stock's large-cap, defensive nature with relatively low volatility. The point estimate assumes minimal drift with slight upward bias typical of blue-chip stocks. Daily volatility for PG typically ranges 1-2%, so I applied approximately 1% daily standard deviation. Confidence intervals were calculated using normal distribution assumptions: 50% CI uses ~0.67 standard deviations, 80% CI uses ~1.28 standard deviations, and 90% CI uses ~1.65 standard deviations from the point estimate.
